title: MMS Psychology
imageAlt: MMS Psychology social preview featuring the Sam Mary Moscovitz logo on white brick
summary: A website I built for my mum’s psychology practice, including service information, fees and online booking.
description:
I built this website for my mum’s psychology practice. The main goal was to make the important information easy to find and give clients a straightforward way to book an appointment.

You can use the live site below without leaving this page.

title: Football Management Panel
imageAlt: Football Management Panel application interface running beside the Java project workspace
summary: A Java desktop application for managing football teams and players.
description:
I built this as a Java project to practise working with multiple screens, application state and a larger codebase. It includes a management interface for football teams and players.

Most of the work was about getting the different parts of the program to work together while keeping the interface understandable.

title: FileDrop
imageAlt: FileDrop parachute logo on a sky-blue background
summary: A tool for sharing files between Mac and Windows computers over the same Wi-Fi network.
description:
FileDrop lets you send files between Mac and Windows computers when they’re connected to the same Wi-Fi network. I started it because moving files between the two platforms is more annoying than it should be.

The project is still in development. The latest code and progress are on GitHub.
